title: Property Consultant - NoBroker - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NoBroker - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NoBroker has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
